title: Cash Planning Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger cash planning foundations judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Cash Planning Foundations is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Cash Planning Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good cash planning foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Cash Planning Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
